speed_trial.name: Speed Trial
speed_trial.description: Win 3 combats in 2 rounds or fewer
speed_trial.unlock_message: A strange symbol pulses on your map...

perfection_trial.name: Perfection Trial
perfection_trial.description: Win a combat with no damage taken by any party member
perfection_trial.unlock_message: An ethereal door shimmers into existence...

synergy_trial.name: Synergy Trial
synergy_trial.description: All 4 party members use class skills in 2 combats
synergy_trial.unlock_message: The bonds between your party glow with power...

greed_trial.name: Greed Trial
greed_trial.unlock_message: Golden light seeps from the walls...
